desensitization.note: First significant Iran threat in this sequence

model_metadata.calculation_notes: Iran is military/nuclear threat with IRGC survival stakes. IRGC cannot accept face-saving exit - this structurally reduces TACO probability vs trade scenarios.

contradiction_flags: STRUCTURAL: Iran under IRGC cannot accept face-saving exit - TACO probability near zero despite model output
OIL INFLATION: Oil >$85/bbl gives Trump domestic energy pressure that historically reduces TACO rate
DUAL SIGNAL: Trump pushing 'uranium extraction' deal while threatening strikes - negotiation framework exists
